summary: Completed testing of Trader Locked Balance Check and Manual Unfreeze feature. All backend APIs and frontend UI working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created temporary mismatch scenario by adding 50 USDT to locked balance for testing unfreeze form visibility. Cleaned up after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trader locked balance check and unfreeze feature fully tested. Lock button visible in admin Users page for traders. Modal shows balance info, active orders, and mismatch status. Unfreeze form appears only when mismatch detected. All data-testid attributes present: locked-check-btn-{user.id}, unfreeze-amount-input, unfreeze-reason-input, unfreeze-submit-btn.

tests: Returns correct structure with all required fields
Correctly detects mismatch when locked > orders total
Validates amount doesn't exceed locked balance
Successfully updates locked and available balances

frontend_ui_tests.lock_button_visibility: PASS - Lock button visible for traders in admin Users page
frontend_ui_tests.modal_opens: PASS - Modal opens on lock button click
frontend_ui_tests.unfreeze_form_submission: PASS - Form submits successfully, shows success toast, updates balance

features_verified: Lock button visible for traders in admin Users page
Modal opens with correct title 'Проверка баланса трейдера'
Modal shows: available balance, frozen balance, active orders count, orders total
Green block shown when balance matches orders
Red block shown when mismatch detected
Unfreeze form appears only when mismatch exists
